commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a message CLI preload plan that skips configured-channel plugin registry loading for explicit non-dry-run gateway-owned message actions, plus focused helper tests and a changelog entry for #75477.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection shows current main always preloads configured channel plugins before message dispatch, while docs and resolver code make `--channel telegram` and `telegram:...` explicit scoped Telegram selections; I did not run a live Telegram send in this read-only review.
